narration: The public marketing site at /. Hero, trust strip, founder, advisory panel.
Page 4: Diploma courses, sourced live from the Postgres `courses` table.
Diploma detail page — pricing card, manual certificate workflow, full curriculum.
Demo student signs up. Indian-mobile validation is enforced — non 10-digit phones are rejected.
Auto-redirected back to the course with the manual QR checkout modal pre-opened. Form fields are pre-filled from the account.
Student attaches a payment receipt screenshot (we use the logo file as a placeholder for the demo).
“Payment under review” — the purchase row sits in `pending_verification` until admin approves it.
Admin lands on the operations console. KPI tiles show pending receipts, today’s leads, certs to dispatch.
Verification queue — every Buy Now lands here. Receipt thumbnails are inline.
Admin opens the receipt drawer — full-size preview, payer contact (tap-to-call / mail), validity window, admin note.
Receipt approved. Status flips to Active, `activatedAt` is set, validity (180 days) is calculated server-side.
Student dashboard now shows the course as Active with the countdown chip.
Curriculum view — modules + lessons, progress bar (currently 0 %).
Video player. Floating watermark with user phone+email; speed (0.5×–2×) and quality controls. Streaming proxied through /api/stream/<JWT>.
Marking the final lesson auto-inserts a row in `certificate_queue`. Student sees “hardcopy certificate queued for dispatch”.
Curriculum now shows 100 % complete — every lesson green-ticked, progress bar full.
Admin → Certificate dispatch. The demo student’s row is automatically queued — no manual entry needed.
Drawer with recipient details, shipping address field, courier tracking input, and the Printed → Dispatched → Delivered workflow buttons.
Admin marks Dispatched — `dispatchedAt` stamped, tracking saved. Student would be notified by email/SMS in Phase 5.
